script.name: plugin.logistics.dojob
script.description: Logistics Network: Control ship to do the job
script.sourceplaintext:
skip if $a.ship -> exists return null skip if $a.job return null
$pageid = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' $a.ship ->set is being managed: on=[TRUE]
$status = $a.job[5] if $status == 0 $dest = $a.job[1] $ship.docked = $a.ship -> is docked if $ship.docked == $dest $a.ship ->set destination to null $a.job[5] = 2 else $dest2 = $a.job[2] gosub sub.GetEnergy gosub sub.MoveToDest $a.job[5] = 1 end
else if $status == 1 $dest = $a.job[1] $ship.docked = $a.ship -> is docked if $ship.docked == $dest $a.ship ->set destination to null $a.job[5] = 2 else if not $a.ship -> is script plugin.logistics.move on stack of task=0 $a.job[5] = 0 end end
else if $status == 2 $source = $a.job[1] $ship.docked = $a.ship -> is docked if $ship.docked != $source $a.job[5] = 0 return null end $dest = $a.job[2] $ware = $a.job[0] $amt = $a.job[3] $dest2 = null gosub sub.GetEnergy $loaded = $a.ship ->load $amt units of $ware, ignore minimum=[FALSE] $table = $a.data['exports'][$source] if $table $value = $table[$ware] $value = $value - $amt if $value <= 0 remove key $ware from table $table if not size of table $table $table = $a.data['exports'] remove key $source from table $table end else $table[$ware] = $value end end
$table = $a.data['imports'][$dest] $value = $table[$ware] $value = $value - $amt + $loaded if $value <= 0 remove key $ware from table $table if not size of table $table $table = $a.data['imports'] remove key $dest from table $table end else $table[$ware] = $value end $a.job[3] = $loaded
if not $loaded $a.job[5] = 6 return [FALSE] else $read.text = sprintf: pageid=$pageid textid=4242, $ware, null, null, null, null $a.ship ->set command extra display override: text=$read.text $a.job[5] = 3 end
else if $status == 3 $dest = $a.job[2] gosub sub.GetEnergy gosub sub.MoveToDest $ware = $a.job[0] $a.job[5] = 4
else if $status == 4 $dest = $a.job[2] $ship.docked = $a.ship -> is docked if $ship.docked == $dest $a.ship ->set destination to null $a.job[5] = 5 else if not $a.ship -> is script plugin.logistics.move on stack of task=0 $a.job[5] = 3 end end
else if $status == 5 $dest = $a.job[2] $ship.docked = $a.ship -> is docked if $ship.docked != $dest $a.job[5] = 3 return [FALSE] end
$ware = $a.job[0] $amt = $a.job[3] $unloaded = $a.ship -> unload $amt units of $ware $amt = $amt - $unloaded $a.job[3] = $amt $read.text = sprintf: pageid=$pageid textid=4244, $ware, null, null, null, null $a.ship ->set command extra display override: text=$read.text
if $unloaded $table = $a.data['imports'][$dest] $value = $table[$ware] $value = $value - $unloaded if $value <= 0 remove key $ware from table $table if not size of table $table $table = $a.data['imports'] remove key $dest from table $table end else $table[$ware] = $value end end
if $amt <= 0 $a.job[5] = 6 end
else if $status == 6 $a.ship ->set is being managed: on=[FALSE] $a.ship ->set command extra display override: text=null START $a.ship -> command COMMAND_NONE : arg1=null, arg2=null, arg3=null, arg4=null return [TRUE] end
return [FALSE]
sub.GetEnergy: $ship.sector = $a.ship -> get sector $dest.sector = $dest -> get sector $j = get jumps from sector $ship.sector to sector $dest.sector $jumps = 2 + $j if $dest2 $dest2.sector = $dest2 -> get sector $j = get jumps from sector $dest.sector to sector $dest2.sector $jumps = $j end
$j = $a.ship -> get jumpdrive fuel resupply do if $j > $jumps $jumps = $j
$energy.needed = $a.ship ->get needed jump energy: jumps=$jumps $energy.got = $a.ship -> get amount of ware Energy Cells in cargo bay $energy.needed = $energy.needed - $energy.got if $energy.needed > 1 if $a.ship -> is autojump activated if $a.ship -> get amount of ware Navigation Command Software MK1 in cargo bay if $a.ship -> get amount of ware Jumpdrive in cargo bay if not $a.ship -> get amount of ware Jumpdrive Energy Generator in cargo bay if $a.ship -> is docked $docked = $a.ship -> is docked $ship.owner = $a.ship -> get owner race $docked.owner = $docked -> get owner race if $docked.owner == $ship.owner = $a.ship ->load $energy.needed units of Energy Cells, ignore minimum=[TRUE] else = $a.ship -> buy $energy.needed units of Energy Cells end end end end end end end endsub
sub.MoveToDest: $ware = $a.job[0] @ START $a.ship -> call script plugin.logistics.move : Destination=$dest Status=$status Ware=$ware endsub
return null

line.text: set command extra display override: text=
set command extra display override: text=
set command extra display override: text=

sval.val: Logistics Network: Control ship to do the job
